components.name: nui-accordion
components.description: Expandable content sections using native <details>/<summary> with smooth animations and exclusive mode.

components.name: nui-app-header
components.description: Application top bar with left/center/right slot zones, sidebar toggle, and status badge support.

components.name: nui-app
components.description: Application shell creating CSS Grid layout with fixed regions: header, sidebar, content, and optional footer.

components.name: nui-badge
components.description: Status badges and notification indicators with variants (primary, success, danger, warning, info) and data-badge overlay mode.

components.name: nui-banner
components.description: Edge-anchored notification banners with auto-close, priority levels (info/alert), and singleton per placement.

components.name: nui-button
components.description: Styled wrapper around native buttons, including icon buttons and variant styling.

components.name: nui-card
components.description: Flexible content container with consistent surface styling (borders, shadows, hover states) and layout modes.

components.name: nui-code
components.description: Code block with syntax highlighting for web languages (HTML, CSS, JS, TS, JSON) and example block support.

components.name: nui-dialog
components.description: Modal and non-modal dialogs built on native <dialog> element with focus trapping, system dialogs (alert/confirm/prompt), and placement options.

components.name: nui-dropzone
components.description: File drop overlay with named zones, automatic grid layout, and window-level drag event handling.

components.name: nui-icon
components.description: SVG sprite-based icon component with text fallback, scalable sizing, and optional decorative mode.

components.name: nui-input
components.description: Form input components (input, textarea, checkbox, radio, toggle) wrapping native elements with styling and validation.

components.name: nui-layout
components.description: Content grid container with responsive column progression (1/2/3 columns based on viewport).

components.name: nui-link-list
components.description: Navigation list with collapsible groups, active state management, keyboard support, and data-driven API.

components.name: nui-markdown
components.description: Lightweight Markdown to HTML converter with streaming support and NUI component integration (nui-code, nui-table).

components.name: nui-overlay
components.description: Raw modal container for lightboxes, full-screen loaders, and custom modals without dialog structure constraints.

components.name: nui-progress
components.description: Progress indicators with linear, circular, and indeterminate (busy) variants. Self-contained with ARIA attributes.

components.name: nui-select
components.description: Enhanced select with search, multi-select tags, option groups, async loading, and mobile bottom sheet.

components.name: nui-skip-links
components.description: WCAG 2.1 Level A skip navigation links. Auto-detects landmarks or accepts custom anchors.

components.name: nui-slider
components.description: Enhanced range input wrapping native <input type='range'> with custom visual styling and drag interaction.

components.name: nui-sortable
components.description: Drag-and-drop reordering with FLIP animations, touch/mouse/keyboard support, and nui-sortable-item children.

components.name: nui-table
components.description: Responsive table wrapper with mobile card transformation using data-label attributes.

components.name: nui-tabs
components.description: Tabbed interface following ARIA Tab Pattern with height animation and progressive enhancement.

components.name: nui-tag-input
components.description: Tag/chip input with keyboard navigation, hidden form inputs for submission, and editable or display-only modes.

components.name: nui-tooltip
components.description: Contextual help tooltips using native Popover API with smart positioning and ARIA integration.

addons.name: nui.appWindow
addons.description: Programmatic window chrome (title bar, content, status bar) for Electron frameless windows. Factory function, not custom element.

addons.name: nui-code-editor
addons.description: Editable code input with real-time syntax highlighting, caret preservation, auto-indent, and optional line numbers.

addons.name: nui-context-menu
addons.description: Programmatic floating popup menus with positioning, submenus, and keyboard navigation. Factory-based API, no custom element.

addons.name: nui-lightbox
addons.description: Image gallery with thumbnail/full-res lazy loading, keyboard navigation, carousel loop mode, and touch gestures.

addons.name: nui-list
addons.description: Virtualized scroller with integrated search, sort, filter. Renders only visible items for large datasets.

addons.name: nui-media-player
addons.description: Custom-skinnable video/audio player wrapper over native media elements with pause-others and poster support.

addons.name: nui-menu
addons.description: Application-style menubar with dropdowns, nested submenus, and full keyboard navigation.

addons.name: nui-rich-text
addons.description: Lightweight WYSIWYG editor using contenteditable with toolbar for basic formatting, links, tables, and images.

addons.name: nui-wizard
addons.description: Multi-step configuration wizard with progression navigation, validation, and layout modes.

reference.name: accessibility
reference.description: DOM-first accessibility: semantic HTML foundation, ARIA auto-enhancement, roving tabindex, focus management, screen reader support.

reference.name: api-structure
reference.description: Three-tier API namespace: root (lifecycle), components (factory APIs), utilities (helpers).

reference.name: architecture-patterns
reference.description: App architecture: centralized, fragment-based, and hybrid routing with nui-page layout engine.

reference.name: cheatsheet
reference.description: Visual quick reference for icons, CSS variables, and common component patterns.

reference.name: declarative-actions
reference.description: Event delegation via data-action attribute for CSP-safe, decoupled HTML-to-JS communication.

reference.name: getting-started
reference.description: Setup, layout modes, SPA wiring, and the base shell structure.

reference.name: introduction
reference.description: NUI philosophy: browser-native UI toolkit, semantic HTML, progressive enhancement, two usage patterns.

reference.name: utilities
reference.description: Utility functions: createElement, storage, enableDrag, array helpers, environment detection.

foucPrevention.code:
body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }
nui-app:not(.nui-ready) { display: none; }

root.name: setupRouter
root.description: Setup SPA router with fragment loading

root.name: registerAction
root.description: Register a named action handler for the data-action system

components.description: Modal and non-modal dialog wrapper, plus system dialog flows

methods.name: prompt
methods.signature: await nui.components.dialog.prompt(title, message, { fields: [{ id, label, type?, value? }] }, options?)
methods.description: Show prompt dialog, returns object or null

methods.name: page
methods.signature: await nui.components.dialog.page(title, subtitle?, { contentScroll, buttons: [{ label, type, value }] })

components.description: Edge-anchored notification surface

methods.name: show
methods.signature: nui.components.banner.show({ content, placement: 'top'|'bottom', priority: 'info'|'alert', autoClose: ms })

components.description: Hierarchical navigation list with fold and tree modes
File drop zone with named regions

utilities.name: createElement
utilities.signature: nui.util.createElement(tag, { class, attrs, data, events, content, target })
utilities.description: Concise DOM construction from declarative options

utilities.name: enableDrag
utilities.description: Unified pointer drag abstraction (mouse+touch), returns cleanup function

utilities.name: storage.set
utilities.description: Write to cookie or localStorage with optional TTL

utilities.name: sortByKey
utilities.description: Sort array of objects by key
